title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina Part 9: PCR Enrichment
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol adds barcode primers and master mix to samples to prepare for PCR enrichment as outlined in the NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit
steps_raw: This protocol adds barcode primers and master mix to samples to prepare for PCR enrichment as outlined in the NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit
Temperature module is cooled to 4 C

25 uL of master mix is added to each sample. NOTE: If more than 6 columns (48 samples) are specified, the master mix is split evenly between two strips on the temperature deck. The OT-2 will alternate between the two strips as it adds to the plate.
The foil covering the primer plate is pierced with a P300 tip before the P20 is used to add 10 uL of primer to each sample. A new set of tips is used for each pierce and addition.
The OT-2 will flash to alert on protocol completion
keywords: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina
materials_raw: Opentrons 96 Well Aluminum Block with Generic PCR Strip 200 µL
